title: Tendrum
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[Moff/Legends|Moff]] '''Tendrum''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] Moff engaged in petty intrigues. Tendrum was visited by an arrogant Imperial [[Noble/Legends|noble]], who made reassurances that the latter's presence there was to plumb the [[Planet/Legends|planet's]] natural secrets, not to [[Spy/Legends|spy]] on the Moff's actions.

==Sources==
*<!-- 1995-12-11 -->''[[Heroes & Rogues]]'' {{1stm}}
